name: Impossible Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 10" pie plate.
3. Beat all ingredients in a blender on high until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
5. Bake for 50-55 minutes, or until a knife inserted comes out clean. At high altitudes, bake for about 55 minutes.
